---
pagetitle: "Esteios"
---

<html>
<head>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
html, body { width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; background: white; }
body { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<h1 style="font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 300; color: #2a2a2a; letter-spacing: 0.1em; font-family: 'Crimson Text', Georgia, serif;">Paciência</h1>
</body>
</html>
